title: Israel to Cut Ties With U.N. Chief Over Its Inclusion on Sexual Violence Blacklist
summary_full: The United Nations secretary general, António Guterres, told Israel there had been an “increasing number of cases” of sexual violence against Palestinian detainees, according to a letter shared by Israel’s U.N. ambassador.
